question: Does expect field specificity predict lane outcome quality?
actual: Specificity predicts: 74% (short) → 84% (medium) → 92% (long). Quantitative 91% vs qualitative 76% (OR=3.44, 1.21x lift). Loop closure dominant: MERGED 78% vs ABANDONED 31% full-loop (OR=8.17, phi=0.292, chi2=23.6). n=275 closed lanes, 277 with expect fields.
diff_from_expect: Predicted >30 char → >90% merge. Got >80 char threshold. Predicted quantitative 2x lift. Got 1.21x (direction right, magnitude overpredicted). Did NOT predict loop closure as dominant mediator (OR=8.17 >> OR_quant=3.44). Non-monotonicity: very long fields (87%) slightly worse than long (92%) — possible prediction overfit.
